description_public: A polygenic estimate related to aerobic training response tendency variation in the general population.

GG.notes: This genotype has been associated in some studies with a somewhat stronger improvement in aerobic capacity from endurance training. Training quality and consistency remain the main drivers of performance.

GA.notes: This genotype may be linked to an intermediate pattern of endurance adaptations, with genetics playing only a small role beside training, nutrition, and recovery.

AA.notes: Some research suggests this genotype may show slightly smaller VO₂max gains, but exercise habits, coaching, and health easily outweigh these subtle genetic effects.

evidence.title: Placeholder evidence for Aerobic training response tendency
evidence.quote: This genotype has been associated in some studies with a somewhat stronger improvement in aerobic capacity from endurance training. Training quality and consistency remain the main drivers of performance.
